seo.title: Taman Wisata Bougenville | Luxury Mountain Resort in Bandung
seo.description: Experience luxury in nature at Taman Wisata Bougenville. Exclusive private villas, authentic Nusantara cuisine, and pristine nature experiences in Mount Puntang, Bandung.
seo.keywords: villa bandung, mountain resort puntang, luxury glamping bandung, family gathering bandung, honeymoon villa west java

home.welcomeDesc: Discover serenity in the embrace of Mount Puntang's nature. Our exclusive villas are designed to provide an unforgettable holiday experience, just 2 hours from Jakarta.
home.experiencesTitle: Where Every Moment Becomes an Adventure

experiences.natureDesc: Discover the untouched beauty and fresh nature of Bougenville

footer.tagline: A luxury mountain sanctuary rooted in the heritage of Nagara Puntang. Reconnect with nature in its purest form.
footer.newsletterDesc: Join our exclusive list for updates and special offers.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Taman Wisata Bougenville. All Rights Reserved.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Nature's Heritage Meets Luxury
about.philosophyDesc1: Amidst the hustle and bustle of modern life, Taman Wisata Bougenville exists as an exclusive escape just 2 hours from Jakarta. We believe that true luxury is not about artificial grandeur, but intimacy with nature, precious silence, and quality moments with loved ones.
about.philosophyDesc2: Every corner of Bougenville is designed to bring you closer to nature, family, and yourself. Discover authentic luxury in the midst of ancient pine forests at the foot of Mount Puntang.
about.valueHeritageDesc: Preserving the spirit of the Nagara Puntang Kingdom through architecture that respects nature and sincere Sundanese hospitality.
about.valueSustainabilityDesc: We are committed to responsible, eco-conscious practices — preserving the natural beauty of Gunung Puntang as a legacy for generations to come.
about.valueAuthenticityDesc: A sincere experience, without pretense. From the warm welcome of our staff to the details of solid teak interiors.
about.valueCommunityDesc: Empowering the local community through hospitality training and partnerships with surrounding farmers.
about.historyDesc1: Centuries ago, the "Nagara Puntang" Kingdom stood majestically on this land. A kingdom known for its harmony with nature and wisdom in managing mountain resources.
about.historyDesc2: We keep that spirit alive through architecture that respects nature and sincere Sundanese hospitality. Each villa is designed with the philosophy of "blending with nature without changing it"—a philosophy practiced by our ancestors for hundreds of years.
about.historyDesc3: Mount Puntang is not just a place. It is a witness to history, a guardian of tradition, and home to generations who care for this ancient pine forest with all their hearts.
about.responsibilityDesc: As a resort in the heart of the mountains, we have a responsibility to protect the ecosystem that sustains this beauty. Bougenville adheres to the "leave no trace" principle and is fully committed to nature preservation.
about.ctaDesc: We invite you to be part of our story. Book your stay today.

stillHaveQuestions.title: Still Have Questions?
stillHaveQuestions.desc: Our friendly team is here to help. Reach out via WhatsApp, phone, or email and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

bespoke.label: Curated Just For You
bespoke.title: True Luxury Defies Standard Packages
bespoke.description: We believe that every meaningful journey cannot be generalized. Currently, we do not offer generic packages. Instead, our Concierge Team invites you to design an exclusive itinerary fully tailored to your rhythm and desires.

dining.title: Personalized Dining
dining.desc: From a private BBQ in the middle of the forest to an exotic breakfast by the river, we help craft a personalized culinary journey rich in Nusantara flavors.

amenities.title: Exclusive Amenities
amenities.desc: Every detail of your stay will be meticulously attended to—from arrival decorations and priority access to curated romantic moments.

activities.title: Curated Activities
activities.desc: Consult your vacation interests with us, and get a special guide to explore the pine forest ecosystem and river more privately and elegantly.

resto.title: Dining & Function
resto.subtitle: Nusantara flavors, elevated by the serenity of Mount Puntang
resto.menuDesc: Three dishes most beloved at Bale Puntang — each one carrying a story, a memory, and a flavor that lingers long after the meal.
resto.heroSubtitle: A dining experience that transcends the ordinary — the depth of Nusantara's culinary soul, set against the quiet majesty of Mount Puntang
resto.story1Title: A Table Set by the Cigeureuh River
resto.story1Desc: Bale Puntang places your table at the heart of nature itself — beside the gentle whisper of the Cigeureuh River, beneath a canopy of Puntang pines. Choose the warmth of our intimate wooden interior, or surrender to the open terrace where the mountain breeze becomes part of the experience. Here, the setting is not the backdrop — it is the dining itself.
resto.story2Desc: We do not follow trends — we honour legacy. From the clear, soul-soothing Soto Bandung to the gloriously crispy Gurame Terbang, every plate at Bale Puntang is an act of devotion to Indonesia's culinary wealth — cooked with sincerity, served with quiet pride.
resto.story3Desc: Bale Puntang is where celebrations find their setting. Family milestones, exclusive corporate retreats, intimate occasions — all belong here. Let the mountain sky and the sound of flowing water bear witness to your finest moments.

values.title: A Heritage of Taste, Unsurpassed
values.desc: At Bale Puntang, great dining is not about spectacle. It is about honesty — the Nusantara culinary tradition carried across generations, brought to your table with quiet pride and deep reverence, amidst the unrivalled beauty of Gunung Puntang.

cta.title: Allow Us to Welcome You
cta.subtitle: Reserve your table and experience the true depth of Nusantara cuisine, high above the valleys of Puntang

facility.title: Facilities & Experiences
facility.subtitle: Discover various exciting activities in nature

map.title: Explore the Map
map.desc: Our resort spans over 5 hectares of lush landscape. Visit our front desk for a guided map or adventure recommendations.

location.title: Find Us
location.subtitle: An exclusive escape embraced by nature. Hidden on the lush slopes of Mount Puntang, Taman Wisata Bougenville offers an unforgettable sanctuary with seamless accessibility from the city's main transit hubs.

info.title: Essential Information
info.roadDesc: Paved and secure roads suitable for all vehicles, from sedans to medium buses. Enjoy a scenic overture of mountain panoramas during the final 3 kilometers to the resort.
info.signalDesc: Excellent 4G coverage (Telkomsel and XL). Complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the resort to keep you seamlessly connected.
info.parkingDesc: Spacious, well-organized private parking area, thoughtfully guarded by our 24-hour security team.
info.transportDesc: Effortless travel from the city center. We highly recommend private cars or ride-hailing services for the utmost comfort. Local transit options are also available.

steps: Exit the airport towards the Pasteur or Pasir Koja Toll Gate.
Enter the Soroja Toll Road to bypass city traffic completely.
Exit at Soreang, turn left towards Banjaran, and follow the scenic route to Mount Puntang.
airport.note: Highly recommended route. A smooth highway drive culminating in a welcoming mountain breeze.

steps: From the station, seamlessly connect to the Padaleunyi Toll Road heading to Bandung.
Transition into the Soroja Toll Road (Soreang-Pasir Koja).
Exit at Soreang and proceed along the main road to Cimaung.
whoosh.note: The swiftest and most refined option for guests arriving from Jakarta via the High-Speed Railway.

steps: Head south from the station towards the Moh. Toha Toll access.
Choose between the city surface streets or the toll road to Soreang.
As you reach the Cimaung intersection, the crisp mountain air begins to greet you.
station.note: This route takes you through the heart of the city. We suggest traveling outside peak hours for a more relaxed drive.

steps: Enjoy a straightforward drive via the Cipularang Highway towards Bandung.
Transition smoothly to the Soroja Toll at the Pasir Koja interchange, avoiding city congestion.
Upon exiting Soreang, our exclusive mountain retreat is merely a 30-minute scenic drive away.
jakarta.note: An uninterrupted highway journey providing maximum efficiency from the capital to the tranquility of nature.

steps: Navigate southward through Moh. Toha or the Dayeuhkolot area.
Continue straight across the bustling Banjaran square.
Set your course towards Pangalengan, taking a left turn to ascend Mount Puntang.
city.note: A classic route for those who wish to experience the city's dynamic pace before retreating to absolute silence.

membership.heroSubtitle: An exclusive circle for those who appreciate nature's tranquility and authentic luxury.
membership.invitationDesc: Bougenville Circle is not just a membership, it is the key to personalized experiences at Taman Wisata Bougenville. We invite you to be part of our story.
membership.privilege1Desc: Be the first to know about villa availability on favorite dates and private event invitations.
membership.privilege2Desc: Enjoy privileged rates for your stays and special compliments upon arrival.
membership.privilege3Desc: Our concierge team will recognize your preferences to ensure every visit feels like coming home.
membership.ctaDesc: Be part of our family and start your journey of luxury in nature.
membership.formSubtitle: Join a community of nature enthusiasts. Limited slots available for this season.

seo.title: Sustainability | Taman Wisata Bougenville
seo.description: Our commitment to nature conservation, community empowerment, and eco-friendly practices in Mount Puntang.
seo.keywords: eco resort bandung, sustainable tourism indonesia, nature conservation puntang

hero.label: Our Commitment
hero.title: Harmony with Nature
hero.description: We don’t just exist in nature; we are part of it. Our mission is to preserve the beauty of Mount Puntang for generations to come.

message.quote: Leave nothing but footprints, take nothing but pictures.
message.body: At Taman Wisata Bougenville, luxury and sustainability go hand in hand. We believe that true hospitality means caring for our guests and our home—the earth. From protecting the Cigeureuh river to empowering our local Sundanese community, every decision we make is rooted in respect for the environment.

conservation.title: Forest Conservation
conservation.desc: We actively protect over 5 hectares of pine forest and native vegetation, ensuring a safe habitat for local biodiversity such as the Javan Eagle.

water.title: Water Stewardship
water.desc: The Cigeureuh river is our lifeline. We implement strict strict 'no-chemical' zones near waterways and treat all wastewater biologically.

waste.title: Responsible Waste
waste.desc: We aim for zero-waste-to-landfill. Organic waste is composted for our gardens, and recyclables are processed by local partners.

community.title: Community Empowerment
community.desc: Over 80% of our staff are from local villages. We prioritize local farmers and artisans for our kitchen and decor needs.

plastic.label: Green Initiative
plastic.title: Towards Plastic-Free
plastic.description: We are phasing out single-use plastics across our resort to reduce our environmental footprint.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Terms and Conditions of our service

sections.title: 1. General Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using the Taman Wisata Bougenville website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our services.

sections.title: 2. Reservations and Payment
sections.content:
• All reservations are subject to room/villa availability.
  • A down payment may be required to secure your booking.
  • Full payment must be settled according to the instructions provided at booking confirmation.
  • Prices are subject to change without prior notice, but will not affect confirmed reservations.

sections.title: 3. Cancellation and Refunds
sections.content:
• Cancellation policies vary depending on the rate plan and promotion booked. Please refer to your booking confirmation for specific details.
  • Cancellations made within a certain period prior to arrival may incur a cancellation fee.
  • Refunds (if applicable) will be processed to the original payment method within a reasonable timeframe.

sections.title: 4. Guest Rules
sections.content:
• Guests are required to maintain order and quiet for the comfort of other guests.
  • Illegal activities, carrying illegal drugs, or dangerous weapons are strictly prohibited on resort premises.
  • Property damage caused by guests will be subject to replacement costs.
  • Check-in time is 14:00 WIB and Check-out is 12:00 WIB, unless agreed otherwise.

sections.title: 5. Liability
sections.content: Taman Wisata Bougenville is not liable for loss or damage to guest valuables not stored in safety deposit boxes (if available) or due to guest negligence. We are also not liable for injuries caused by guest negligence or violation of resort safety rules.

sections.title: 6. Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms and Conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Indonesia. Any disputes arising shall be resolved in the jurisdiction of Indonesian courts.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Our commitment to protecting your data

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: Welcome to Taman Wisata Bougenville. We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit our website or use our services.

collection.title: 2. Information We Collect
collection.content:
We may collect the following information:

  • Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, and other identity information you provide when making a reservation or contacting us.
  • Reservation Information: Dates of stay, room preferences, and special requests.
  • Technical Information: IP address, browser type, and website usage data (cookies) to improve user experience.

use.title: 3. Use of Information
use.content:
We use your information to:

  • Process your reservations and payments.
  • Contact you regarding booking confirmations or service changes.
  • Send promotional information or newsletters (if you opted in).
  • Improve the quality of our services and website.

protection.title: 4. Data Protection
protection.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, misuse, loss, or damage.

sharing.title: 5. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We only share information if required by law or with third-party service providers who assist our operations (e.g., payment processing), under strict confidentiality obligations.

contact.title: 6. Contact Us
contact.content:
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
Email: booking@tamanwisatabougenville.com
Phone: +62 811 910 2003
